question.label: Role anchor

i love the discussion with all the team a
strretchhing is I am not able to really mange the experience

question.label: Managing experience

question.description: Drills into the specific challenges Sarah faces in managing the experience.

answer: the experience of the app, the UX, the UI o the gloibal app

question.label: Specific challenge in UX
question.name: When you mention 'the experience of the app, the UX, the UI of the global app', what specifically within that is challenging you? Is it a resource issue, alignment, or something else?
question.description: Seeks to clarify the specific challenges Sarah faces in managing the app experience.

answer: well i am here to talk about my career not this issue

question.label: Direction
question.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
question.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

answer: hard to say, i want ot be head of the UX in allianz

question.label: Head of UX pull
question.name: Head of UX at Allianz — what is it about that role that pulls you? Is it the scope, the people, the title, or something else?
question.description: Drills into what specifically attracts Sarah to the Head of UX role.

note: [SHALLOW] 'Title :) money' lacks specifics on role attraction beyond superficial aspects.

question.label: Head of UX specifics
question.name: When you say 'Title :) money' — what specific responsibilities or opportunities in the Head of UX role are you excited about?
question.description: Seeks clarity on what aspects of the Head of UX role beyond title and compensation are appealing to Sarah.

answer: i like to help our teams thrive

question.label: Commitment to action
